heroHeading: Why teams choose GLUCOSE over traditional solutions
heroSubtext: Enterprise teams need autonomous AI agents that understand context, deliver personalized experiences, and scale effortlessly—not rule-based chatbots that frustrate customers.
sectionSubtext: See why leading brands are switching from traditional chatbots and generic AI solutions to GLUCOSE's autonomous agents.
ctaSubtext: Join leading enterprise brands who have switched from traditional chatbots to GLUCOSE's autonomous AI agents.

comparisonBlocks.heading: Goal-driven reasoning, not scripted responses
comparisonBlocks.body: Traditional chatbots follow rigid decision trees that break when conversations shift. GLUCOSE agents reason through complexity, adapting to context and pursuing goals autonomously.
bullets: Understands intent even with unexpected questions
Balances user needs with business objectives
comparisonBlocks.visualDesc: GLUCOSE agents work toward outcomes, not just responses. They understand context, remember history, and make intelligent decisions.

comparisonBlocks.heading: Native multi-channel, not bolted-on integrations
comparisonBlocks.body: Most solutions treat messaging channels as an afterthought. GLUCOSE is built from the ground up for WhatsApp, Telegram, LINE, and more—meeting customers where they already are.
bullets: Deploy on WhatsApp, Telegram, LINE, Viber, and more
No app downloads required for customers
comparisonBlocks.visualDesc: One configuration, every channel. Your brand shows up wherever your customers prefer to communicate.

comparisonBlocks.heading: No-code setup, not months of development
comparisonBlocks.body: Traditional enterprise AI deployments take months and require technical teams. GLUCOSE's Management Console lets product managers configure, deploy, and iterate without writing code.
bullets: Visual journey builder for business users
Iterate and improve without engineering support
comparisonBlocks.visualDesc: Define customer journeys, configure responses, and analyze performance—all through an intuitive interface designed for business users.

comparisonBlocks.heading: Proactive re-engagement, not just reactive support
comparisonBlocks.body: Traditional chatbots wait for customers to ask questions. GLUCOSE agents proactively engage—sharing relevant information, following up on service needs, and driving conversions.
comparisonBlocks.visualDesc: GLUCOSE doesn't just answer—it anticipates. Proactive outreach keeps customers engaged throughout their journey.

testimonials.label: Our Customers
testimonials.heading: The results speak for themselves
testimonials.subtext: GLUCOSE is trusted by leading brands across industries to transform customer engagement.

items.quote: The platform's ability to understand context and deliver personalized responses transformed customer support operations. It's like having a team of experts available 24/7.
items.name: Gennady K.

items.quote: GLUCOSE changed how we think about customer engagement. The AI doesn't just respond—it understands our products and brand voice perfectly.
items.name: Product Head

items.quote: We've seen a dramatic improvement in response quality and customer satisfaction since implementing GLUCOSE. The autonomous agents handle complex queries with ease.
items.name: Tech Lead

items.quote: The platform handles everything from warranty inquiries to service bookings autonomously. Our customers get instant, accurate responses around the clock.
items.name: Service Manager

items.quote: Patient engagement has never been easier. The AI understands medical context and provides appropriate guidance while maintaining compliance.
items.name: Digital Health Director

items.quote: Our customers receive personalized financial guidance instantly. The compliance guardrails give us confidence to scale without risk.
items.name: VP Customer Experience

items.quote: Post-purchase support is now a competitive advantage. Customers love getting instant help with setup and troubleshooting.
items.name: Product Manager

items.quote: We reduced support costs by 40% while improving CSAT scores. The AI handles routine queries so our team can focus on complex issues.
items.name: CX Operations Lead

items.quote: Subscriber engagement increased significantly. The AI recommends content and handles account queries with our brand's personality.
items.name: Head of Growth

pricingHeading: Pricing tied to outcomes, not seats
pricingSubtext: GLUCOSE's pricing model is aligned with the value it delivers. You pay for results — not licenses, not seats, not per-message fees.
